listitem.para: * res = a tlist provided by a regression function
* out = the file where the results are printed (optional; default: %io(2), i.e the screen)

refentry.refsection: DESCRIPTION Prints on the file out the results from any regression that have been saved in results tlist. The function simply determines the method used and calls a specialised printing function such as prtuniv, prtunitr,...

refsection.title: EXAMPLE
